prompt: Ultra-detailed 2x2 portrait grid featuring four different young men, each poking their head through a torn, irregular hole ripped into bright yellow seamless backdrop paper. The cast has a 90s indie-rock vibe with varied hair textures, think wild curls and locs. Studio lighting is soft and flat, like a pro magazine shoot. The vibrant yellow paper fills the frame while a neutral beige background peeks through the jagged tears. Editorial photography feel, crisp focus, 8k resolution. How to dial it in: Framing: 2x2 quad-grid layout, each subject peeking through a punched hole. Hero Prop: ripped yellow construction paper, rough torn edges, seamless paper BG. Talent Look: Gen Z streetwear, indie-band energy, 90s alt-lite vibe, expressive young faces. Capture Specs: even flat lighting, shallow depth of field, clean studio look, punchy color saturation.
